creator: jb.1234abcd@gmail.com
text:
Correction.
Instead of

Two possibilities:
1. the plugin does not charge to the max possible and does not stop
charging

it should be

Two possibilities:
1. the ACPI module does not control charging to the max 100% correctly

Note;
actually it takes a few weeks for the battery plugin to show change in status
from 98% (Charging from AC)  to 100%, but then the same day it goes back
to 98% (Charging from AC), and repeats the cycle.
